# Contact and Support

This repository is a public product showcase for DelphiMTKClient.

For pricing, licensing, private source code access or technical questions, contact:

https://t.me/GsmCoder

Product page:

https://alephgsm.com/2026/04/25/delphimtkclient/

## Before Opening an Issue

Do not post:

- Private keys.
- Device credentials.
- Customer files.
- Payloads.
- Loader binaries.
- Commercial source code snippets.
- Sensitive exploit implementation details.
